entry.title: adapt, adopt
entry.summary:
Author: MCUsic_to_my_ears

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,759Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: A messenger arrives at Talia's door. The Bat has summoned her to Gotham, but not for the reason she thinks.Or, Bruce asks Talia to step up as a parent.

entry.title: Part of That World
entry.summary:
Author: BobaTheBlackHole

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,320Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 60

Summary: “She was my world, Bruce… and you took her away from me.” Bruce loved Clark before he knew what to call it. He stayed close enough to protect him.Far enough to understand he would never be chosen. And when Bruce finally confessed, Clark’s answer was disgust. But love does not disappear just because it is unwanted. Sometimes, it survives the wound.Sometimes, it survives the ruins.Sometimes, it survives time itself. Even for the person who never wanted it back.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: What If Bruce got Hit by Magic...
entry.summary:
Author: Rhythm_Of_The_Wind

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,289Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 375

Summary: ...And it projects his thoughts out loud like a reverse mind reading? Beware, for you're about to learn the intimate, unfiltered thoughts of the Dark Knight. Featuring: emotional damage, secondhand embarrassment, and Bruce Wayne having zero thoughts about himself.   Warning: 80% of Bruce’s brain is just “my babies :)”

entry.title: Mr. and Mrs. Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: GothamNocturne

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,375Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 37

Summary: **This is the sequel to Bruce and Selina** Bruce Wayne finally chooses the life he once believed he couldn't have - a wife, a daughter, and a world he's trying to hold together. But peace in Gotham never comes without a cost. When an old debt pulls Selina into something she can't walk away from, secrets begin to fracture the foundation of both their marriage and the Justice League. As whispers of invasion spread and trust begins to erode, Bruce is forced to make an impossible choice: Stand with the world. Or stand with his family. Because sometimes the greatest threat isn't the one descending from the stars - It's the one everyone believes is already inside your home. And this time, the cowl may not survive the cost.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Unpleasant Emotions
entry.summary:
Author: FINscourge

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,581Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 70

Summary: Minhkhoa Khan did not understand emotions, not really. He could logically understand how they worked, what caused them, and how people generally acted while under their influence. Bruce Wayne did not belong under the categorization of regular people. Bruce Wayne twisted and fought his emotions. He wrangled them under logic, and locked every emotion deemed too much behind numerous barricaded doors within his mind. Bruce Wayne, who to Minhkhoa’s informed opinion had reached a new low in the mishandling of his own emotions. Or Minhkhoa Khan sees an opportunity and does not lose his shot on claiming it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Batman And Harley Quinn The Rise Of Sin Tsu.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,679Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 0

Summary: One year post the events of Under The Red Hood, Bruce has slowly come to accept that Jason wishes not to be found. Alongside this Bruce and Harleens relationship continues to blossom as Harleen settles into life at Wayne Manor alongside continuing her work as the new Bat Girl. This small peace though does not last forever as a new threat soon arrives in Gotham with the intent of bringing the Dark Knight to his knees, and if that was not all working alongside this new threat is someone tied to both Bruce and Talia's past.

entry.title: the osaka incident (Or...five bats walk out of five bedrooms and none of them are walking straight)
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,422Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: The Batfamily has many rules. Don't go into Gotham Harbor during a Joker attack. Don't touch Alfred's scones without asking. Don't mention what happened in Titan Tower if you want to keep your teeth. But somewhere along the line, they missed a crucial one: 𝘈𝘭𝘸𝘢𝘺𝘴 𝘤𝘩𝘦𝘤𝘬 𝘸𝘩𝘰 𝘦𝘭𝘴𝘦 𝘪𝘴 𝘪𝘯 𝘚𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘹 𝘚𝘢𝘸𝘢𝘬𝘰'𝘴 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘥𝘲𝘶𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘴 𝘣𝘦𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘸𝘢𝘭𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘢 𝘣𝘦𝘥𝘳𝘰𝘰𝘮. 𝘈𝘯𝘥 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘎𝘰𝘥'𝘴 𝘴𝘢𝘬𝘦, 𝘸𝘢𝘭𝘬 𝘯𝘰𝘳𝘮𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺. Or: Five Batfamily members travel to Osaka for various reasons. None of them knew the others were there. None of them knew their 𝘩𝘰𝘴𝘵𝘴 were... complicated. Bruce limps out of Silencer's room. Jason stretches his sore back coming out of Salix's room. Damian walks stiffly out of Kaminari's room. Tim rolls his shoulder coming out of Bianca's room. Azrael walks with careful precision out of Rin's room. Nightwing whistles casually out of Sakura's room. None of them are fooling anyone. Hikari needs a drink.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: They think Im crazy because of you
entry.summary:
Author: Mangojuiceeyy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 796Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: When Batman rises, becoming the Dark Knight who vows to bear Gotham's sins upon his shoulders, Lady Gotham awakens to him. She recognizes not merely a man in a cape, but a knight—her knight—one willing to bleed for a city that has never learned how to love gently. She offers him a precious gift, a companion, a friend, a guardian angel that guides the Caped Cruisader into the dark of the night, but also his daily life OR Batman has an 'invisble' friend that guides him in his decisions, a gift from by lady Gotham. The entity chooses who can see them and decided to stay hidden to (almost) everyone except the Dark Knight so now, everybody thinks Batman is crazy. With how often he talks to himself, it was to be expected.How do Batman's relationships evolve in this universe, where the Voice of Wisdom resides in his head?(he acts like a child at the beggining cuz I HAVE FREE WILL)

entry.title: For the Love of Life
entry.summary:
Author: Phoenix_feathers17

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,967Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Everyone thought Bruce had changed after his parents' death, that he would never be the same. Only Alfred knew that Bruce Wayne could never change. Why, you may ask? Because he loved Life.   (A/N: most of the characters in the tags are just referenced.)

entry.title: A love lost and found
entry.summary:
Author: Clarissa_23

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,060Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 239

Summary: Bruce Wayne dies. The world moves on. Seven years later, Bruce Anthony Williams steps inside Gotham once more and soon learns that the past has an incorrigible way to catch up with him.

entry.title: ​A Tail of Two Bruces
entry.summary:
Author: Vie4477

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,839Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: ​"Nest? Inner omega? No. Absolutely not. Great, Batman was not doing this. This conversation never happened..." ​Forged by justice and trauma, Batman opens his eyes after a lethal battle to his absolute worst nightmare: a happy family. In this universe, Batman never existed. There is only Bruce Wayne, an affectionate father who provides a nest for the stray kids he took in from the streets, radiating intense pheromones. And then there's that new, furry biological reality attached to his coccyx, pushing his rational mind to the brink of collapse...​Yes, it's called a tail.OrBatman is hit by a new rogue capable of teleporting people to alternate dimensions, and opens his eyes in an omegaverse world.​And the Bruce Wayne here, unlike Batman, is actually a good dad. ​Fuck.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: What the Hell, Bruce?
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,142Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: The Batfamily discovers that Batman and Killer Croc have unresolved sexual tension, a mysterious history, and apparently 𝘩𝘰𝘰𝘬𝘦𝘥 𝘶𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘦𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘩𝘴 𝘢𝘨𝘰. Jason is the first to notice. He desperately wishes he wasn't.

entry.title: Collapse
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,061Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 77

Summary: Bruce collapses in the Batcave mid-sentence. No enemy. No poison. No warning. Just his own body giving out after weeks of neglect. The family scrambles to catch him— ...and then has to figure out how to keep him down.

entry.title: Hal vs the Batfam
entry.summary:
Author: Phoenix_feathers17

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,771Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 2,266

Summary: It all started when Hal first met them (If you can call what happened a meeting). It couldn't say exactly how his first encounter went down as he had been too confused to keep up with all that happened around him. It was after his second encounter with one, though, that everything started to go downhill. For some reason, he had caught the sight of the batkids (yes, batkids. The Batman had kids) and now he just had to survive their antics until Bats decided to introduce them to the rest of the league. Oa help him if that doesn't happen soon.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,255Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 594

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the shovel talk, extended universe edition
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,577Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Bruce Wayne's past and present love interests discover that Deathstroke was his first. They form an impromptu coalition. Slade Wilson contemplates the benefits of early retirement. Bruce contemplates the benefits of a timeline where he made better choices. Neither gets what they want.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the shovel talk, plural, with extreme prejudice
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,068Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: The Batfamily discovers that Deathstroke has been sleeping with their dad's teenage alternate-timeline self. They take this about as well as can be expected. Bruce (present) and Bruce (nineteen) watch from a rooftop. Neither is entirely sure they want to intervene.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
